subject: feat(debug): add React DebugPill with pub/sub, console interception, clipboard fallbacks
body:
Two-phase debug system: inline HTML pill (pre-React) + React DebugPill
(post-mount in separate #debug-root, survives App crashes).

- debugLog.js: typed pub/sub event store, 200-entry circular buffer,
  URL query param redaction in reports
- debugConsoleInterceptor.js: patches console.error/warn with reentrant
  guard to prevent infinite recursion
- DebugPill.jsx: 3 tabs (Log, Environment, PWA), collapsed pill badge,
  3-tier clipboard fallback (ClipboardItem > writeText > textarea)
- main.jsx: transfers inline errors, hides inline pill, mounts React pill,
  uses original console.error in ErrorBoundary to avoid double-capture

Tags: feature, debug, infrastructure
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: minor
